subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in exploring a collaboration opportunity with us. We'd be happy to discuss potential synergies between our teams.

Regarding a meeting, we have the following slots available next week:
• Monday, April 21, 2026: 14:00–16:00
• Tuesday, April 22, 2026: 14:00–16:00
• Wednesday, April 23, 2026: 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which of these works best for you, and we'll send over a calendar invitation.

Regarding your request for internal contact information and phone numbers, I'm unable to share internal directory data. I recommend visiting our public website for official contact channels and publicly listed information.

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Best regards
